text:
/ci1 2 おやおや、面白いのが来たね。
あのダーカーは、ゆるゆる近づき
こちらを奇襲してくるヤツだ。

/ci1 2 ま、不意を突けなければ
ただの攻撃が大振りなダーカーさ。
対処法なんて、容易に想像つくだろう？

/ci1 2 Ah, here comes a most amusing
interloper. That Falspawn likes to feint with a
slow approach before pouncing aggressively.

/ci1 2 So long as it doesn't catch you by
surprise, I'm sure you can work out how to deal
with it.

Ah, here comes a most amusing interloper. That
Falspawn likes to feint with a slow approach
before pouncing aggressively.

So long as it doesn't catch you by surprise,
